mapper.sql: select s.score_id, s.class_course_id, cc.teaching_class_code, s.term_id, t.term_name, s.course_id, c.course_name, s.class_id, cls.class_name, s.student_user_id, coalesce(p.real_name, u.nick_name, u.user_name) as student_name, p.student_no, cc.assessment_type, cc.credits, s.usual_score, s.attendance_score, s.homework_score, s.lab_score, s.exam_score, s.exam_avg_score, s.bonus_score, s.penalty_score, s.usual_weight, s.attendance_weight, s.homework_weight, s.lab_weight, s.exam_weight, s.total_score, s.grade_point, s.grade_level, s.pass_flag, s.rank_no, s.percentile, s.exam_record_count, s.sync_time, s.publish_status, s.publish_time, s.publish_by, s.teacher_comment, s.status, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from sc_student_score s left join sc_class_course cc on cc.id = s.class_course_id left join sc_school_term t on t.term_id = s.term_id left join sc_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id left join sc_class cls on cls.class_id = s.class_id left join sc_user_profile p on p.user_id = s.student_user_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = s.student_user_id
mapper.insert: insert into sc_student_score( class_course_id, term_id, course_id, class_id, student_user_id, usual_score, attendance_score, homework_score, lab_score, exam_score, exam_avg_score, bonus_score, penalty_score, usual_weight, attendance_weight, homework_weight, lab_weight, exam_weight, total_score, grade_point, grade_level, pass_flag, rank_no, percentile, exam_record_count, sync_time, publish_status, publish_time, publish_by, teacher_comment, status, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{classCourseId}, #{termId}, #{courseId}, #{classId}, #{studentUserId}, #{usualScore}, #{attendanceScore}, #{homeworkScore}, #{labScore}, #{examScore}, #{examAvgScore}, #{bonusScore}, #{penaltyScore}, #{usualWeight}, #{attendanceWeight}, #{homeworkWeight}, #{labWeight}, #{examWeight}, #{totalScore}, #{gradePoint}, #{gradeLevel}, #{passFlag}, #{rankNo}, #{percentile}, #{examRecordCount}, #{syncTime}, #{publishStatus}, #{publishTime}, #{publishBy}, #{teacherComment}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
